title: hydrocotyle palmata
intro: Hydrocotyle palmata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Asia and Africa, characterized by its round, coin-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, as well as to regulate blood sugar levels and blood pressure. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle palmata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Indian pennywort are typically made from the leaves and roots of the plant, and can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
